---
title: "Memory Tiering in Python Virtual Machine"
date: 2025-10-09
year: 2025
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3759548.3763372"
venue: "VMIL 2025"
award: ""
code: ""
slides: "files/slides/vmil2026.pptx"
preprint: ""
video: ""
author:
  - name: Yuze Li
  - name: Shunyu Yao
  - name: Jaiaid Mobin
  - name: Tianyu Zhan
  - name: M. Mustafa Rafique
  - name: Dimitrios Nikolopoulos
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Ali R. Butt
categories:
  - Workshop
description: ""
---
